message:
🌱 Add kubernetes: managedFields options are very verbose, making kubectl mission (#1560)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubernetes-90066-managedfields-options-are-very-verbose-making-kubectl-usage-a-b",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubernetes: managedFields options are very verbose, making kubectl usage a bit ",
+    "description": "managedFields options are very verbose, making kubectl usage a bit . Requested by 300+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubernetes deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubernetes version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubernetes -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubernetes\nhelm list -n kubernetes 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubernetes installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubernetes configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubernetes configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubernetes -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubernetes\nkubectl get configmap -n kubernetes -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubernetes\n```\nRecently (1.18?) a new field was added to configs, managedFields. This is incredibly verbose, which makes kubectl commands like `-oyaml` and `edit` painful."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for managedFields options are very verbose, making kubectl…",
+        "description": "With the introduction of `.meta.managedFields` it's cumbersome to edit any resource due to the size of that additional fields. This PR hides those fields, since they should not even be modified by consumers directly.\n```yaml\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"18\", GitVersion:\"v1.18.0\", GitCommit:\"9e991415386e4cf155a24b1da15becaa390438d8\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2020-03-25T14:58:59Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"18\", GitVersion:\"v1.18.0\", GitCommit:\"9e991415386e4cf155a24b1da15becaa390438d8\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2020-03-25T20:56:08Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubernetes -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubernetes\nkubectl get events -n kubernetes --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"managedFields options are very verbose, making kubectl…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "With the introduction of `.meta.managedFields` it's cumbersome to edit any resource due to the size of that additional fields. This PR hides those fields, since they should not even be modified by consumers directly.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Client Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"18\", GitVersion:\"v1.18.0\", GitCommit:\"9e991415386e4cf155a24b1da15becaa390438d8\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2020-03-25T14:58:59Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"18\", GitVersion:\"v1.18.0\", GitCommit:\"9e991415386e4cf155a24b1da15becaa390438d8\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2020-03-25T20:56:08Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.8\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
